titleStmt.title: SII 26.392: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 392. (A.R. No. 371 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: It records a gift of a nandā lamp and 32 cows to provide for this to the temple of the god Tiruppulippagavar of the same place as occurred in No. 391 above, by the temple Śivabrāhmaṇa Bhāradvāji Pañchaṉadi-periyān who prayed for a son and was blessed with one. In lieu of the cows a sum of 10 Anṟāḍu-Naṟkāśu was received by the temple Śivabrāhmaṇas who had agreed to burn the nandā lamp for ever in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīkolottuṅkacoḻadevarkku yāṇṭu nāṟpattoṉpatā
vatu malāṭākiya jaṉanātavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu brahmateyañ ciṟṟiṅkūr Āḷuṭaiyār
tiruppulippakavatevarkku Ikkoyilil civabrāhmaṇan bhāradvāji pañcaṉati periyān Itdevarkku prār
tittu Āṇpiḷḷai peṟṟuvaitta tirunantāviḷakku Onṟukku pacu muppattiraṇṭukkāka Ikkoyilil civa
brāhmaṇarom Eṅkaḷupaiyattāl koṇṭa Anṟāṭunaṟkācu pattu Ikkācu pattum kaikkoṇṭu Ittevar
kkut tirunantāviḷakkoṉṟum cantrātittavaṟ Erikkak kaṭavomāka cammatittom Ikkoyil civabrāhmaṇarom Itu panmāyeśvara rakṣai [§*]
Digital edition of SII 26.392 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
